question_text: Which one of the following statements is TRUE?

options.A: The LALR(1) parser for a grammar G cannot have reduce-reduce conflict if the LR(1) parser for G does not have reduce-reduce conflict.
options.B: Symbol table is accessed only during the lexical analysis phase.
options.C: Data flow analysis is necessary for run-time memory management.
options.D: LR(1) parsing is sufficient for deterministic context-free languages.
